a_image.alt: Fluent Design (Microsoft) style mood board — Microsoft · Fluent Design

sections.a_eyebrow: Material Design · Elevation · Modern · Professional · Layered
sections.a_description: Acrylic blur effects, reveal highlights, and the layered depth system of Microsoft's design evolution — Fluent Design brings light, depth, and material awareness to digital interfaces. The clean surfaces stack with precise elevation, the signature blue accent threads through interactive elements, and the overall effect is of interfaces that feel like physical layers of translucent material.

This design system powers Windows 11, Microsoft 365, Teams, and the growing ecosystem of Microsoft's cross-platform applications. You'll see it on Outlook, OneDrive, Azure Portal, and enterprise applications built with Fluent UI — the design language that brought acrylic materials and depth-aware layouts to billions of Windows users.

a_image_cover.alt: Fluent Design (Microsoft) style use case illustration
Fluent Design (Microsoft) style use case illustration
Fluent Design (Microsoft) style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The layered, light-aware aesthetic of Microsoft's Fluent Design System — acrylic blur effects, reveal highlights, and a depth system that uses light, shadow, and material to create hierarchy. Background: light gray (#f3f3f3). The .inner panel has a white background (#ffffff) with a subtle shadow (0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), 0 0 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)) and 8px border-radius — Fluent's 'card' surface with its characteristic thin border (1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06)). Colors: Microsoft blue (#0078d4) as the primary accent — the iconic Windows accent color. Near-black (#1b1b1b) for headings, dark gray (#605e5c) for body text. The aesthetic is clean and layered — surfaces stack with clear visual hierarchy through depth and light. Set in Segoe UI — Microsoft's system typeface, designed for screen clarity on Windows. Heading at weight 600, 24px, line-height 1.3, color #1b1b1b. Eyebrow at weight 600, 11px, uppercase, 1px letter-spacing, color #0078d4. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.5, color #605e5c. Buttons: primary — Microsoft blue (#0078d4), white text, 4px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, gray border. Alternatives: Noto Sans (cross-platform), Inter (modern alternative).
